item.title: Strikes on Iran: From the Twelve-Day War to the 2026 Conflict
item.description: Mapping every documented major strike — who launched it, what was targeted, and when.

item.title: The Strait of Hormuz: Oil's Most Critical Passage
item.description: 21 million barrels of oil transit this 3km-wide chokepoint every day.

item.title: Gulf State Relations: The Regional Power Balance
item.description: How Iran, the Gulf states, and their proxies are aligned — and where US military power sits.

item.title: The Red Sea Crisis: Trade Reroutes Around a War Zone
item.description: Houthi attacks near the Bab-el-Mandeb strait pushed global shipping onto a 10-day detour around Africa.

item.title: Operation Absolute Resolve: How the US Captured Nicolás Maduro
item.description: From the first boat strike in September 2025 to Delta Force storming Maduro's compound in Caracas — every key event mapped.
